title: Midtown Manhattan
summary: The central operating area Division Agents are activated to secure against the Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion.

claims.text: After Green Poison, SHD Agents are activated to help secure Midtown Manhattan.
The Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion are the three violent factions named in that mission.

paragraphs.text: Midtown Manhattan is the core crisis area of the original activation, where SHD supports the effort to restore security against three organized hostile factions.

verification.notes: District and landmark records will be separated after a first-game location inventory.
